batches.name: Legacy & Core Styles (Wave 1)
batches.rationale: Independent design implementations for core styles

tasks.title: Implement 'academia' style
tasks.prompt: Create a new Next.js page in 'app/styles/academia/page.tsx' following the 'academia' design in 'lib/styles-registry.ts' (Elegant, Scholarly, refined). Reference 'app/styles/art-deco/page.tsx' for structure but use appropriate typography and colors.

tasks.title: Implement 'bold-typography' style
tasks.prompt: Create a new Next.js page in 'app/styles/bold-typography/page.tsx' following the 'bold-typography' design in 'lib/styles-registry.ts' (Creative, Type-driven design). Use large, impactful headers and stark layouts.

tasks.title: Implement 'industrial' style
tasks.prompt: Create a new Next.js page in 'app/styles/industrial/page.tsx' following the 'industrial' design in 'lib/styles-registry.ts' (Raw, mechanical, utilitarian). Use metallic colors, monospace fonts, and grid-heavy layouts.

tasks.title: Implement 'material' style
tasks.prompt: Create a new Next.js page in 'app/styles/material/page.tsx' following Google Material Design guidelines (Modern). Use elevation, shadows, and standard Material color palettes.

tasks.title: Implement 'minimal-dark' style
tasks.prompt: Create a new Next.js page in 'app/styles/minimal-dark/page.tsx' (Minimal dark theme). Focus on high-contrast, clean lines, and a dark aesthetic optimized for developer tools.

tasks.title: Implement 'neo-brutalism' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/neo-brutalism/page.tsx'. High contrast, bold borders, saturated colors, and aggressive shadows.

tasks.title: Implement 'neumorphism' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/neumorphism/page.tsx'. Soft UI, monochromatic shadows (extrusion/intrusion) for a tactile feel.

tasks.title: Implement 'newsprint' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/newsprint/page.tsx'. Serif fonts, multi-column layouts, and a physical newspaper aesthetic.

tasks.title: Implement 'humanist-literary' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/humanist-literary/page.tsx'. Quiet intelligence, organic warmth, focus on readable serif typography and ample white space.

tasks.title: Implement 'saas' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/saas/page.tsx'. Modern SaaS aesthetic: clean, gradient-accented, feature-rich landing page layout.

tasks.title: Implement 'sketch' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/sketch/page.tsx'. Hand-drawn icons, rough borders, and an artistic, 'work-in-progress' feel.

tasks.title: Implement 'swiss' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/swiss/page.tsx'. International Typographic Style: grid-based, sans-serif (Helvetica-like), and asymmetric layouts.

tasks.title: Implement 'terminal-cli' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/terminal-cli/page.tsx'. Green-on-black (or amber), monospace, command-line interface aesthetic.

tasks.title: Implement 'vaporwave' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/vaporwave/page.tsx'. 80s/90s nostalgia: pink/blue/purple gradients, pixel art elements, and lo-fi aesthetics.

tasks.title: Implement 'web3' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/web3/page.tsx'. Decentralized/crypto-inspired: dark theme, glassmorphism, and neon accents.

tasks.title: Implement 'resend' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/resend/page.tsx'. Minimal, stark black-and-white, developer-focused email infrastructure aesthetic.

tasks.title: Implement 'revolut' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/revolut/page.tsx'. Sleek fintech: smooth transitions, vibrant accent colors, and modern card-based UI.

tasks.title: Implement 'runwayml' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/runwayml/page.tsx'. Dark, professional creative AI studio vibe with high-quality media previews.

tasks.title: Implement 'sanity' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/sanity/page.tsx'. Structured, content-focused, and minimal developer tool aesthetic.

tasks.title: Implement 'sentry' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/sentry/page.tsx'. Bold, functional, error-tracking dashboard aesthetic with purple accents.

tasks.title: Implement 'claude' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/claude/page.tsx'. Warm, intellectual, focus on content and typography (Anthropic style).

tasks.title: Implement 'clay' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/clay/page.tsx'. Soft shadows, tactile, personal CRM aesthetic with focus on networks.

tasks.title: Implement 'clickhouse' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/clickhouse/page.tsx'. Data-dense, high-performance database monitoring aesthetic (yellow/black).

tasks.title: Implement 'cohere' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/cohere/page.tsx'. Natural language patterns, earthy tones, and organic AI aesthetic.

tasks.title: Implement 'coinbase' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/coinbase/page.tsx'. Clean, trusted, secure blue-and-white financial/crypto interface.

tasks.title: Implement 'logic-gate' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/logic-gate/page.tsx'. Visual workflow, circuit logic, and tactile automation builder aesthetic.

tasks.title: Implement 'code-flow' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/code-flow/page.tsx'. Spatial repository visualization, high-density developer tool layout.

tasks.title: Implement 'prompt-palace' style
tasks.prompt: Create 'app/styles/prompt-palace/page.tsx'. Majestic LLM interface, luxury gold/black theme for prompt engineering.
